description: Sample audit queries for Ollama evaluation harness

queries.query: What is the total budget allocation mentioned in the documents?
List all agencies or departments mentioned in the documents.
What dates or time periods are covered by these documents?
Are there any contradictory statements about funding amounts across different documents?
Do any documents contradict each other regarding project timelines or deadlines?
Are there inconsistencies in how responsibilities or authorities are assigned?
Do the documents mention informed consent procedures for research subjects?
Is there evidence of Institutional Review Board (IRB) approval for research activities?
Are protections for human subjects mentioned in compliance with 28 C.F.R. Part 46?
Do the documents describe procedures for protecting vulnerable populations?
What infrastructure projects or facilities are mentioned in the documents?
Are there any procurement or contractor relationships described?
Do the documents mention facility compliance or safety standards?
What federal grants or funding mechanisms are mentioned?
Are there any potential conflicts of interest related to grant funding?
Do the documents describe performance incentives or financial bonuses?
Are matching funds or cost-sharing requirements mentioned?
Provide a concise executive summary of the key findings from these documents.
What are the most critical issues that require immediate attention?
What recommendations would you make based on the audit findings?
